events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes fireblocking/draftstopping work where foam was used where fire-rated sealant was required (identified by color/label). This is non-compliant with IRC R302 which requires fireblocking/draftstopping to be done with approved materials. Standard foam is not fire-rated and doesn't meet the requirements.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (fire safety issue)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 85-90% since rough is complete but needs rework
Confidence: high, maybe 0.9

  "rationale": "IRC R302 requires fireblocking and draftstopping with approved fire-resistant materials. Using standard foam where a fire-rated sealant is specified creates a non-compliant fire-spread path in concealed spaces.
